title: About Alex and NextGen
imageAlt: Employees working together in a bright, open-plan office

segments.text: Alex works at NextGen, a large, fast-paced, tech-forward company
as a client-facing
consultant.
Alex’s role often involves tasks like data analysis, conducting research, drafting up reports, and delivering presentations to key stakeholders.
Alex is part of a
six-person, cross-functional team
that collaborates with one another on shared projects and day-to-day work tasks. Alex’s team is
hybrid
, and so they have the option to work with one another either in-person or remotely, through
work messaging apps like Slack or Teams
, email, or video calls.
One of Alex’s peer teammates is
Sam
, who is a fellow consultant. Alex and Sam have a
professional working relationship
where they collaborate and seek one another’s input or feedback.
Like many companies, NextGen provides its employees access to an
in-house AI chatbot agent, named
Aidee
, to support their work. Employees can use two versions of Aidee:

items.text: version that works as well as the leading AI chatbots (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini).
A NextGen-specific version that works similarly well, but has been trained on and has
, such as past reports and presentations.

segments.text: Aidee is fully compliant with NextGen’s privacy and security requirements. Alex can access
Aidee privately
on their own computer, or through a
shared team workspace
, where teammates such as Sam can view Alex’s interactions with Aidee and join the conversation at any time.
